boxes.label: Your habits (list)
boxes.note: One row per habit; tap to check off today.

boxes.label: Drag me — I'm placed far out
boxes.note: Proof you can grab blocks well beyond the first screen.

brief.title: Habit tracker
brief.summary: A simple daily habit tracker: add a few habits, check them off each day, and watch your streak grow. This is a worked example — review the tabs, then edit it or tap Prepare for Claude to send your own.

features.title: Add a habit
features.detail: Name it and choose how often (daily or weekly).

features.title: Check off today
features.detail: Tap a habit in the list to mark it done for today.

features.title: Streak counter
features.detail: Show how many days in a row you've kept it up.

features.title: Daily reminder
features.detail: An optional notification to nudge you each day.

notes.title: About this example
notes.body: This is a preset project to review — a Habit Tracker designed across the tabs. Wireframe = the home screen (a list of habits + an Add button). Flowchart = the daily loop. Relationships = the data (habit + check-in). Brief = what it is, with the features listed. When you like a design like this, the maker can turn it into a real app, or tap Prepare for Claude to hand it to me. Edit anything here freely — it's just a starting point.
notes.author: claude

wires.note: Tapping 'Add habit' inserts a new row in the habit table.
Tapping a habit in the list marks its check-in done for today — the list row (a habit) identifies which check_in to write.
